meta.description: Backtrack lost-found matching threshold evaluation dataset
meta.thresholdRationale: Threshold 0.89 được chọn để tối ưu cả Recall lẫn Precision — hệ thống đạt Recall 100% (không bỏ sót match thật) đồng thời giảm false positive xuống còn 1, đạt Precision 0.86 và F1 0.92. Đây là điểm tối ưu tốt hơn 0.9 vì loại bỏ thêm một false positive mà không làm mất bất kỳ match thật nào.

pairs.note: Same person, full info, descriptions match closely. Baseline easy case.

lostPost.title: Lost FPT student card
lostPost.details: FPT student card, Software Engineering major

foundPost.title: Found FPT student card
foundPost.details: Student card from FPT University, major in Software Engineering

pairs.note: Same keychain; descriptions agree on key count + Pikachu charm.

lostPost.title: Lost keychain with Pikachu charm
lostPost.distinctiveMarks: 3 keys: 1 house key, 1 motorbike key, 1 small key. Has yellow plastic Pikachu charm

pairs.note: Same iPhone; model + color + unique Koi fish sticker match. Vietnamese description.

lostPost.title: Mất iPhone 14 Pro Max màu tím
lostPost.distinguishingFeatures: Ốp lưng trong suốt có dán sticker hình con cá Koi màu cam ở mặt sau

foundPost.title: Nhặt được iPhone tím trong khuôn viên
foundPost.distinguishingFeatures: Có ốp trong, mặt sau có sticker hình cá vàng/cam

pairs.note: Same card; one post uses full name 'Vietcombank', other uses abbreviation 'VCB'. Same holder name.

lostPost.title: Mất thẻ ATM Vietcombank
lostPost.details: Thẻ ghi nợ nội địa Vietcombank, mặt trước có logo VCB màu xanh lá đặc trưng

foundPost.title: Nhặt được 1 thẻ ngân hàng
foundPost.details: Thẻ ghi nợ màu xanh lá

pairs.note: Same wallet; loser writes Vietnamese with emotion, finder writes terse English. Cross-language recall test.

lostPost.title: Mất ví da nâu, ai nhặt được liên hệ giúp
lostPost.distinctiveMarks: Vết xước nhỏ ở góc dưới, bên trong có ảnh con gái nhỏ

foundPost.title: Found brown leather wallet
foundPost.distinctiveMarks: Scratch on bottom corner, contains a small photo of a young girl

pairs.note: ⚠ Tricky FP — same brand/family/color but different chip generation (M2 vs M3). Two different units.

lostPost.title: Lost MacBook Air M2 in Space Gray

pairs.note: Same headphones; lost post is detailed, found post is sparse. Detail asymmetry recall test.

lostPost.title: Lost Sony WH-1000XM4 black
lostPost.distinguishingFeatures: Small scratch on left earpad, 3.5mm cable still inside the case

pairs.note: ⚠ Tricky FP — same color + same form factor (white TWS earbuds with case) but completely different brand. AirPods Pro vs Galaxy Buds2.

lostPost.title: Lost AirPods Pro white earbuds
lostPost.distinguishingFeatures: MagSafe charging case with a small dent on the lid

foundPost.title: Found white wireless earbuds with case
foundPost.distinguishingFeatures: Compact oval charging case, no visible damage

pairs.note: Clear no-match — different brand (Anker vs Xiaomi), different capacity, different color.

lostPost.title: Lost Anker powerbank
lostPost.distinguishingFeatures: Has a label with the name 'NGUYEN' on the bottom, 20000mAh capacity

foundPost.title: Found a small Xiaomi powerbank
foundPost.distinguishingFeatures: Slim, lightweight, 10000mAh capacity, single USB-C port

pairs.note: Clear no-match — different material (stainless vs Tritan plastic), different color, different capacity.

foundPost.title: Found a pink plastic water bottle
